remaining_params.SpellDescription: If you control Equipment named Helm of Kaldra, Sword of Kaldra, and Shield of Kaldra, create Kaldra, a legendary 4/4 colorless Avatar creature token. Attach those Equipment to it.
remaining_params.StackDescription: {p:You} creates Kaldra, a legendary 4/4 colorless Avatar creature token.

params.Description: Equipped creature has first strike, trample, and haste.
